Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.animation

Class FlixelAnimationController

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.animation.FlixelAnimationController
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelUpdatable
public class FlixelAnimationController extends Object implements FlixelUpdatable
Playback state and clip registration for FlixelSprite animations. Obtain a controller with FlixelSprite.ensureAnimation() (or assign via FlixelSprite.setAnimation(FlixelAnimationController)), then call sprite.ensureAnimation().loadSparrowFrames(...), .playAnimation(...), etc. Decouples animation timing from rendering and physics.

    Dispatched once when a non-looping clip reaches its end, or when looping is turned off at end.
    final @NotNull FlixelSignal<FlixelAnimationFrameSignalData>
    onFrameChanged
    Dispatched when the visible keyframe index changes.

    • FlixelAnimationController

      public FlixelAnimationController(@NotNull @NotNull FlixelSprite owner)
      Creates a new animation controller for the given sprite.
      Parameters:
      owner - The sprite that owns this animation controller.

  • Method Details

    • loadSparrowFrames

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSparrowFrames(@NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle textureFile, @NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle xmlFile)
      Loads a Sparrow-format XML atlas (SubTexture elements) using a texture already registered as a FlixelGraphic under textureFile.path(). Parses frames here; the owning sprite receives the graphic and FlixelSprite.getAtlasRegions() list via FlixelSprite.applySparrowAtlas(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics.FlixelGraphic, com.badlogic.gdx.utils.Array<me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.graphics.FlixelFrame>).
      Parameters:
      textureFile - image file whose path is the asset key for the backing FlixelGraphic
      xmlFile - Sparrow XML file
      Returns:
      the owning sprite for chaining

    • loadSparrowFrames

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSparrowFrames(@NotNull @NotNull String textureKey, @NotNull @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.files.FileHandle xmlFile)
      Parameters:
      textureKey - asset key of the FlixelGraphic
      xmlFile - Sparrow XML file
      Returns:
      the owning sprite for chaining

    • loadSparrowFrames

      @NotNull public @NotNull FlixelSprite loadSparrowFrames(@NotNull @NotNull String textureKey, @NotNull com.badlogic.gdx.utils.XmlReader.Element xmlRoot)
      Parses Sparrow SubTexture entries and installs the result on the owner.
      Parameters:
      textureKey - asset key of the FlixelGraphic
      xmlRoot - root XML element (e.g. from XmlReader.parse(FileHandle))
      Returns:
      the owning sprite for chaining

      public void addAnimationByPrefix(@NotNull @NotNull String name, @NotNull @NotNull String prefix, int frameRate, boolean loop)
      Adds an animation to the controller by prefixing the frame names.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation.
      prefix - The prefix of the frame names.
      frameRate - The frame rate of the animation.
      loop - Whether the animation should loop.

    • addAnimation

      public void addAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name, int[] frameIndices, float frameDuration)
      Adds an animation to the controller by specifying the frame indices.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation.
      frameIndices - The indices of the frames to add.
      frameDuration - The duration of each frame.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name)
      Plays the animation with the given name. Loops and restarts the animation by default.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation to play.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name, boolean loop)
      Plays the animation with the given name. Restarts the animation by default.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation to play.
      loop - Whether the animation should loop.

    • playAnimation

      public void playAnimation(@NotNull @NotNull String name, boolean loop, boolean forceRestart)
      Plays the animation with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the animation to play.
      loop - Whether the animation should loop.
      forceRestart - Whether the animation should restart.
